g.text: SQLite Write-Ahead Log (.wal) Binary Format | Spec v3007000

ul.li: Algorithm: s0 += x + s1; s1 += s0;
Computed on both frame headers and raw page data.
The WAL Index is a memory-mapped file (.shm).
Contains a bitmask of modified pages for fast lookups.
Volatile: On process crash/salt mismatch, truncate and rebuild from .wal.
Checkpointing can be PASSIVE, FULL, or RESTART.

g.title: Reading from DB + WAL redirection via SHM
Reading from DB + WAL redirection via SHM
